source.originalDocument: 20260506_B Wumutijiang Grade Distribution Public Records Act Request.pdf

suppression.representation: Suppressed grade counts are null in records.grades and listed in records.suppressedGrades. Display them as "<10" with range 0-9.

enrollmentSource.caution: The enrolled value is the scraped section enrollment reference, not a guaranteed final grade-outcome denominator.

source.summary: Instructor-by-course term summaries for grade distribution UI. Each term selects one A-prioritized representative section for chart counts and enrollment; A-rate averages sections with visible A counts.
